title: ipomoea marginata var. stipulacea
intro: Ipomoea marginata var. stipulacea, also known as the "Red-leaf Morning Glory," is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Ipomoea marginata var. stipulacea include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use by drying the leaves and stems, which can then be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions.
